policy_doc_required_tokens: The Shell is a lens, not a mirror.
The Shell default data shape is a projection, not a runtime object.
raw tool inputs, raw tool outputs, trace bodies, plan graphs, or eval payloads
Shell event payloads must be minimal and serializable

forbidden_patterns.description: Shell app-store snapshots/events must not retain raw/root store references.
Shell search must not stringify raw tool inputs/results.
The Svelte chat store must not retain the full filtered message source as Shell-owned state.
Conversation cache sanitization must not deep-clone full message objects.
Shell localStorage must not persist the full conversation cache object.
Window globals must not mirror full conversation cache state.
Shell session cache must not store JSON-cloned normalized full message arrays.
Default message rows must not retain raw tool input/result fields.
Collapsed default tool cards must move raw input/result rendering behind lazy detail fetches.

shell_chat_store_full_filtered_source_re.reason: Known Svelte projection bridge debt while visible-window ownership is being moved out of Shell state.
shell_chat_store_full_filtered_source_re.replacement_plan: Replace full filtered source retention with backend/window cursor detail loading under POLICY-REFINE-003/005.

shell_conversation_cache_deep_clone.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard cache path still mirrors the parts source.
shell_conversation_cache_deep_clone.replacement_plan: Convert conversation cache to bounded preview-only rows.

shell_conversation_cache_deep_clone.reason: Legacy cache sanitizer still clones full messages before stripping streaming fields.
shell_conversation_cache_deep_clone.replacement_plan: Replace with preview projection cache that never clones full messages.

shell_conversation_cache_full_state_pers.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard cache persistence mirrors the parts source.
Legacy cache persistence predates Shell projection policy.

shell_window_full_cache_mirror.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard global cache mirror remains during Alpine/Svelte transition.
shell_window_full_cache_mirror.replacement_plan: Remove window global cache mirror when preview cache lands.

shell_window_full_cache_mirror.reason: Legacy runtime cache bridge remains during Alpine/Svelte transition.
shell_window_full_cache_mirror.replacement_plan: Replace with bounded app-store preview projection.

shell_normalized_full_messages_cache.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard normalized cache path mirrors the parts source.
shell_normalized_full_messages_cache.replacement_plan: Cache message previews and fetch message details by ID.

shell_normalized_full_messages_cache.reason: Legacy session-load cache path still stores cloned normalized messages.
shell_normalized_full_messages_cache.replacement_plan: Cache message previews and fetch message details by ID.

shell_tool_raw_payload_row_retention.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard normalizer keeps raw tool fields for expanded cards.
shell_tool_raw_payload_row_retention.replacement_plan: Replace raw fields with input_ref/result_ref and lazy detail fetch.

shell_tool_raw_payload_row_retention.reason: Legacy normalizer keeps raw tool fields for expanded cards.
shell_tool_raw_payload_row_retention.replacement_plan: Replace raw fields with input_ref/result_ref and lazy detail fetch.

shell_tool_expanded_raw_payload_render.reason: Legacy assembled dashboard still contains tool input/result display and formatting paths.
shell_tool_expanded_raw_payload_render.replacement_plan: Move tool display details behind input_ref/result_ref detail fetch routes and rebuild the assembled dashboard source.

shell_tool_expanded_raw_payload_render.reason: Current tool-card expansion still renders raw input/result fields from the default row.
shell_tool_expanded_raw_payload_render.replacement_plan: Move expanded tool cards to get_tool_result/tool detail references.
